channel.title: Devops on Nate Glenn's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Devops on Nate Glenn's Blog

item.title: Preparation: The Key to a Less Painful Windows Reinstall
item.author: garfieldnate <at> gmail <dot> com (Nathan Glenn)
item.description: Recently I decided to work on an easy ticket in StepMania to get into the source code. It turned out that I (gasp!) actually needed to build the project on my computer, but of course I was missing required libraries: DirectX 9 and the DirectX SDK. No matter what I tried, neither of these would successfully install on my computer, and I decided that the only way to install it would be to reinstall Windows (which worked, but ugh!
